problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
